message:
test(pipeline): add edge case tests for conditions and variables

- Add TestNavigateNested_EdgeCases for YAML-style maps, []string arrays,
  nil values, and unsupported types
- Add TestFormatValue covering all type conversions (bool, int, int64,
  float64, []byte, time.Time, time.Duration, maps, slices)
- Extend TestConditionEvaluator_NumericErrors to test all comparison
  operators (<, >=, <=) error paths

Coverage improved from 52.1% to 59.7% for internal/pipeline/

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
